summary: Completed testing of Bolt AI Builder cofounder mode upgrade. Backend APIs working perfectly with structured responses, but critical frontend authentication/routing issue preventing IDE access.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Streaming tokens not received in test environment
flaky_endpoints.impact: Build mode streaming may have timeout issues

integration_issues.issue: After successful login, IDE route redirects back to login page instead of loading IDE interface
Login API request failing with net::ERR_ABORTED in browser

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ai/chat with project_id returns structured response
Backend: Structured responses contain expected format (What I Found, Recommended Changes, etc.)

success_percentage.backend: 85% - New chat and analyze features working perfectly, streaming has minor issues
success_percentage.frontend: 20% - Critical authentication/routing issues preventing IDE access

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication flow - IDE route not accessible after login. Login API requests failing in browser. Cannot test Build/Chat mode toggle, Audit button, or structured response rendering until IDE loads properly.
